CustomField.description: Controls which Opportunity attribution type this naming rule applies to. Valid values are "Individual" (Opportunities attributed to Contacts via the Household or One-to-One account model), "Organizational" (Opportunities attributed to Organization Accounts), or "Both". Determines the scope of Opportunities affected by this naming format. Each naming rule should target a specific attribution to allow different naming conventions for individual vs. organizational gifts.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Whether this naming rule applies to individual Opportunities, organizational Opportunities, or both.
CustomField.label: Attribution
